message:
fix(channel): add missing `mut` on receiver bindings across all channel types

The channel receiver's `try_recv` method requires `&mut self` (consistent
with the `TaskHandle::try_join` signature change), but several test call
sites and internal helpers were binding the receiver as immutable. This
caused borrow-checker failures wherever `rx.try_recv()` was invoked on a
non-mut binding.

Affected modules:
- crash.rs: 3 test functions (passthrough_when_disabled,
  restart_re_enables_sends, crash_after_sends)
- fault.rs: 4 test functions (passthrough_when_disabled, duplication,
  reorder, delay)
- mpsc.rs: 1 internal helper binding
- oneshot.rs: 2 test bindings + 1 internal pattern
- partition.rs: 3 test functions + 1 internal binding

Corresponding integration tests updated in lockstep:
- channel_crash_injection.rs, channel_fault_injection.rs,
  channel_partition_injection.rs, mpsc_fifo_repro.rs,
  property_sync_channel.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
